name: Accton Technology Corporation
summary: Accton Technology Corporation engages in the provision of networking and communications solutions in the United States, Europe, Taiwan, and rest of Asia. It develops, manufactures, and sells computer network system products; and wireless land area network products, as well as provides technical consulting and engineering design services. The company offers data center switches, open packet transponders, cloud server appliances, and flash storage systems; carrier access solution; and wired and wireless network solutions. It also provides IoT integration solution; cloud-based video surveillance solutions; and software-defined wide-area networks, such as ARM-based virtual network edge device white boxes. Accton Technology Corporation was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
